description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a vertically ribbed body and a flat, circular removable lid. The lid features a central, top-mounted handle for easy lifting, and the bin itself has two side-mounted, rectangular handles for carrying. The surface is a matte, slightly textured gray metal, typical of galvanized steel bins used in urban environments. The bin appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor use on sidewalks, in parks, or near garages. There are no visible wheels or labeling, and the design is simple and functional. The overall appearance suggests durability and ease of manual handling.
description: A gray, cylindrical metal trash bin with a flat removable lid and side handles, featuring a ribbed body and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central handle and a single side handle visible on the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting both rectangular side handles and the top-mounted lid handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the lid handle and one side handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing both side handles and the central lid handle.
attribute_handle_design: side-mounted rectangular handles and top-mounted lid handle
